questions.question: 1 (a) Using Fig. 2.1, determine (i) the distance from the man’s home to the café. distance = .................................................. km [1] (ii) the time taken to walk to the café. time = .............................................. hours [1] (iii) the speed, in km / hour, of the man as he walks to the café
